name: Гутрак Костолом
notes: Gutrak the Bonebreaker, an orc grappler of the Kragmir fighting club. He is one of five champions the party meets on the small arena. He wins by seizing an opponent and crushing them in a submission hold rather than by trading blows, and once a day he shrugs off a killing blow and keeps fighting.

actions.name: Grab
actions.text: Requirements Gutrak hit with a grabbing fist this turn. The target is grabbed until the end of his next turn (Escape versus DC 27).

actions.name: Bone-Crushing Squeeze
actions.text: Requirements Gutrak has a grabbed target. It takes @Damage[(2d8+7)[bludgeoning]] damage; @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|basic:true]. Nonlethal.

actions.name: Knockdown
actions.text: Gutrak makes a greataxe Strike. On a hit he attempts a free Trip with Athletics +20.

actions.name: Orc Ferocity
actions.text: Frequency once per day. Trigger Gutrak drops to 0 Hit Points. Effect he stays at 1 Hit Point instead.
